features: Aluminum-Free — Deodorant made without aluminum, parabens or phthalates. Powered by naturally derived ingredients.
48-Hour Protection — Extra-strength formula works overtime so you can sweat with confidence.
Award-Winning Formula — Glides on clear and smooth, never transfers onto clothes.
Unisex — High-performance, innovative formula and scents made for both men and women.
Signature Scents — Made with safe synthetic and naturally derived fragrances. Free of phthalates.
description: Directions Apply to clean, dry skin. Safety Warning For external use only
